DEFT'S MOT FOR CONTINUANCE (PRELIM HRG) FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:SUBPOENAED RECORDS RELEASED TO PUBLIC DEFENDERCINDY ELIAS,/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION TO HAVE DEFENDANT EXCLUDED FROM THE COURT ROOM DURING IDENTIFICATION OF HIM BY THE WITNESS IS GRANTED,//WIT SWORN:ELIZABETH GRAHAM/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 - HAND-WRITTEN DIAGRAM/X:THEDEFENDANT RETURNS TO THE COURT ROOM FOR FURTHER PRELIMINARY HEARING PROCEEDINGS,/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER ADAM GREEN/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/X:THE COURT HEARS ARGUMENTS FROM RESPECTIVE COUNSEL,/X:THE COURT DISMISSES COUNT 1 REFLECTED IN THE COMPLAINT AS A FELONY CHARGE OF PENAL CODE SECTION 211, PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 871,/X:THE COURT ADDSCOUNT 1 AS A LESSOR FELONY CHARGE OF PENAL CODE SECTION 487 TO CONFORM TO PROOF AFTER HEARING,/HTA1:001 AS AMENDED/871D:002/BAIL:25,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY PUBLIC DEFENDER PAUL MYSLIN,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/BAIL:75,000/NTW/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 08-31-12/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/TEXT:INFO WILL NOT BE FILED PER DISTRICT ATTY/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/SA1:ELIZABETH GRAHAM/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/NTW60/LD 10-16-12/DOP/
